Interactive Shiny Apps

Explore statistical concepts interactively through embedded Shiny-style web applications.

Note: These apps are built using pure JavaScript/HTML to run directly in the browser — no server required. For full Shiny apps, deploy via shinyapps.io and embed the iframe.

App 1: Distribution Explorer

Interactively explore statistical distributions by adjusting parameters.

📊 Distribution Explorer

App 2: Regression Simulator

Interactively add data points and watch the regression line update in real time.

📈 Regression Simulator — Click on the chart to add points!
Add points to see regression results

App 3: Central Limit Theorem Visualizer

🔔 Central Limit Theorem Demonstration


Population Distribution
Sampling Distribution of x̄

Want Full Shiny Apps? For server-side Shiny apps with live data, database connections, and full R computations, deploy via shinyapps.io and embed them here using iframes. See the Statistics with R section for code examples.
